name: latchx-repo
description: Source repository for latchx, a safer npx replacement that audits npm packages before execution.

scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w latch-core && npm run typecheck -w @meredian-labs/latchx && npm run typecheck -w @meredian-labs/latchpm
scripts.demo:latchx: npm run build -w latch-core && npm run build -w @meredian-labs/latchx && node packages/latchx/dist/index.js doctor && node packages/latchx/dist/index.js audit is-number --ci --no-cache && node packages/latchx/dist/index.js inspect is-number --json --ci
scripts.demo:latchpm: npm run build -w latch-core && npm run build -w @meredian-labs/latchpm && node packages/latchpm/dist/index.js doctor && node packages/latchpm/dist/index.js audit is-number --ci --no-cache && node packages/latchpm/dist/index.js inspect is-number --json --ci
